qa_pairs.question: Which locations in Okinawa have Twitter data on Saturdays with no more than 0 likes and reach at most 247?
qa_pairs.sql:
SELECT location.locationid FROM location
JOIN twitter ON location.locationid = twitter.locationid
JOIN user ON twitter.userid = user.userid
WHERE twitter.likes <= 0.0 AND twitter.reach <= 247.0 AND location.state = 'Okinawa' AND twitter.weekday = 'Saturday'

qa_pairs.question: Which locations in Gold Coast have tweets with exactly 5 retweets, a klout score of exactly 28, and exactly 0 likes?
qa_pairs.sql:
SELECT location.locationid FROM location
JOIN twitter ON location.locationid = twitter.locationid
JOIN user ON twitter.userid = user.userid
WHERE location.city = 'Gold Coast' AND twitter.retweetcount = 5.0 AND twitter.klout = 28.0 AND twitter.likes = 0.0

qa_pairs.question: What locations in Curitiba, BR are associated with users whose gender is Unknown and have tweets with at least 15 retweets?
qa_pairs.sql:
SELECT location.locationid FROM location
JOIN twitter ON location.locationid = twitter.locationid
JOIN user ON twitter.userid = user.userid
WHERE location.statecode = 'BR' AND location.city = 'Curitiba' AND user.gender = 'Unknown' AND twitter.retweetcount >= 15.0
qa_pairs.canonical_question: Which location entities with statecode equal to 'BR' and city equal to 'Curitiba', having at least one related twitter record (linked on location.locationid = twitter.locationid) with retweetcount at least '15.0', whose twitter record itself has at least one related user record (linked on twitter.userid = user.userid) with gender equal to 'Unknown'?
